descriptionShort: Centennial Cup results showing Richmond defeating Dartmouth 7-3 and tournament standings.
descriptionLong: Sports results page from The Province dated May 4, 1987, featuring Centennial Cup junior-A hockey action in Humboldt. Richmond defeated Dartmouth 7-3 while Humboldt beat Pembroke 4-2. Round-robin standings show Humboldt at 2-0, Richmond at 1-1, with Pembroke and Dartmouth also listed. Attendance recorded at 8,033 with Pembroke vs. Richmond scheduled for that evening.
